specific_question: In Q4, 2024, how did Elexion’s in-house battery recycling initiative impact its overall production efficiency?
answer: Elexion’s internal sustainability report for Q4 2024 showed that implementing closed-loop battery recycling reduced raw material procurement costs by 12% and improved production efficiency metrics across its Texas manufacturing facilities.
